tasks.label: shell: install curated skills
tasks.command:
DEST=/Users/goldmonkey/Projetos/Apps-Proprios/chefiapp-pos-core/.agents/skills && SRC=/tmp/antigravity-skills/skills && SKILLS=(
  typescript-expert typescript-advanced-types typescript-pro
  react-best-practices react-patterns react-state-management react-ui-patterns react-modernization
  clean-code code-review-excellence code-refactoring-refactor-clean
  nodejs-best-practices nodejs-backend-patterns
  senior-architect architecture architecture-patterns software-architecture senior-fullstack
  postgres-best-practices postgresql database-design database-migration sql-optimization-patterns
  docker-expert deployment-pipeline-design github-actions-templates devops-troubleshooter vercel-deployment
  api-design-principles api-security-best-practices auth-implementation-patterns security-auditor
  stripe-integration stripe-automation
  testing-patterns e2e-testing-patterns javascript-testing-patterns
  systematic-debugging debugging-strategies debugging-toolkit-smart-debug
  web-performance-optimization performance-engineer
  tailwind-design-system tailwind-patterns
  accessibility-compliance-accessibility-audit
  seo-fundamentals
  git-advanced-workflows git-pr-workflows-pr-enhance
  observability-engineer sentry-automation
  full-stack-orchestration-full-stack-feature
  code-review-checklist
) && count=0 && for skill in "${SKILLS[@]}"; do if [ -d "$SRC/$skill" ]; then cp -r "$SRC/$skill" "$DEST/$skill" && count=$((count+1)); fi; done && echo "Copied $count skills" && ls "$DEST" | wc -l && echo 'total skills in .agents/skills'
